ttl.name: YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR (w/ VSC)

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR (for BOSCH Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the yaw rate and acceleration sensor to the bracket with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR

s2.ptxt: Install the yaw rate sensor and acceleration with the 2 bolts.

item.ptxt: Do not damage the yaw rate and acceleration sensor.
Make sure that the yaw rate and acceleration sensor is installed securely.

s2.ptxt: Connect the yaw rate and acceleration sensor connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX DUCT (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 1 console box duct with the clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Install the console box assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX CARPET (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)
INSTALL CONSOLE BOX POCKET (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)
INSTALL UPPER REAR CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and 5 clips to install the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER REAR CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and 5 clips to install the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE PANEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and the 5 clips to install the upper console panel as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FLOOR SHIFT POSITION INDICATOR HOUSING SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 claws and the 3 clips to install the floor shift position indicator housing sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: PERFORM YAW RATE SENSOR ZERO POINT CALIBRATION
